## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between growthx.ai and synapsa.ai, exploring how synapsa's AI-powered conversational tools could benefit growthx's customers.](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [synapsa.ai offers AI-powered conversational tools for mid-funnel engagement, improving marketing conversion and lead qualification](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=231.0)
  - [Pricing is $2,000/month, replacing a warm inbound SDR with set tiers and usage caps](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1863.0)
  - [growthx.ai sees potential value but needs to carefully consider implementation strategy](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1736.0)
  - [WebStacks (growthx customer) identified as potential first test case for partnership](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)

## Topics

### synapsa.ai Product Overview

  - [AI agents trained on company knowledge for conversational engagement](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1255.0)
  - [Identifies and engages warm leads through web chat, email, and text](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=885.0)
  - [De-anonymizes 30-40% of site traffic at contact level](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=892.0)
  - [Adapts page experiences based on user data](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=969.0)
  - [Manages entire meeting experience (booking, reminders, recording)](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1152.0)
  - [Integrates with CRMs like HubSpot and Salesforce for data mapping](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1296.0)

### Implementation Considerations

  - [Can ingest existing customer personas/archetypes for more targeted conversations](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)
  - [Agencies can get certified to deploy and manage synapsa for their clients](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1825.0)
  - [synapsa aims to be tech partner for agencies, not replace strategy/creative](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2302.0)
  - [60-day opt-out period before annual commitment](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2029.0)

### Potential Partnership Structure

  - [growthx could experiment internally first or go directly to customer test case](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=1770.0)
  - [WebStacks identified as good potential first joint customer to trial with](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2142.0)
  - [Opportunity for bi-directional data enrichment between synapsa and growthx](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2376.0)

### Market/Industry Discussion

  - [Challenges of AI hype vs. reality (e.g. AEO, cold outreach)](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2736.0)
  - [Frustration with "vaporware" and exaggerated claims in AI space](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2860.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to reach out to Jesse at WebStacks about potential synapsa trial](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
  - [Maddie to follow up Monday to coordinate WebStacks introduction](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2957.0)
  - [Explore specific use case and experiment structure for initial test](https://fathom.video/share/1FhG2X-y_PFhNCG-EseCzRpszAaox6ms?tab=summary&timestamp=2479.0)
